---
title: "Probability and statistics"
description: |
    A series of lectures on selected topics of “Probability and Statistics” taught for Master/Ph.D. Students and Researchers at the Department of Pharmaceutical Biosciences, Uppsala University.
date: 09-30-2019
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
listing:
  posts:
    - 2019-09-30-basics-of-probabilities
    - 2019-10-10-discrete-random-variables
    - 2019-10-24-continuous-random-variables
    - 2019-11-15-mvt-random-variables
    - 2019-11-21-inference-part1
    - 2019-11-29-inference-part2
---
